message:
Add ApiClient tests for automatic token refresh behavior

Extends ApiClient test suite to properly test token refresh integration:

- Update "expired credentials" test to verify auto-refresh works:
  - Mocks refresh endpoint to return new token
  - Verifies two fetch calls (refresh + actual request)
  - Confirms refreshed token is used in Authorization header

- Add test for refresh failure scenario:
  - Mocks refresh endpoint returning 401
  - Verifies request proceeds without auth header
  - Ensures graceful degradation when refresh token is invalid

These tests complement the needsRefresh and refreshAccessToken
implementations in credentials.ts, providing end-to-end coverage
of the automatic token refresh flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
